span.p:
Gate 1: .gitignore check
Is this path matched by any ignore pattern?
.py → no match → PASS
.env → matched *.env → BLOCKED
.log → matched *.log → BLOCKED
node_modules/ → matched → BLOCKED
.bin → no match → PASS

Gate 2: .gitattributes rules
eol, diff, filter, ident applied

Never enters Git
No index entry, no tracking, no commit history
